def positive_ordered_dict_used_in_python_37_plus_where_dict_suffices():
    rule_id = "ordered_dict_used_in_python_37_plus_where_dict_suffices"
    family = "observability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description = "OrderedDict used in Python 3.7+ code where a plain dict preserves insertion order."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
